{{Quote|I'm so happy.|Kerlay Utanks|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Team Kubindi''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] team that played for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. According to an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] reported on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]], the planet of [[Fwillsving]]'s [[Team Fwillsving|team]] triumphed over the visiting Team Kubindi; the victory inspired a riot wherein four million joyous celebrants ransacked the [[City/Legends|city]] in which they played, [[Svitalos]], by looting, vandalizing, and partying in the streets. For the HoloNet News report, Fwillsving [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Kerlay Utanks]] expressed his joy over Kubindi's loss.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Team Kubindi was mentioned in "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref>
